name: Marinated Beef Province Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into 2-inch cubes.
2. Dice the bacon.
3. Skin and crush the garlic using a firm knife or garlic press; blend with chopped parsley, ground cloves, and allspice.
4. Combine the meat, wine vinegar, wine, and garlic mixture in a dish.
5. Peel one-third of the onions and carrots, thinly slice them, and add to the marinade with salt and pepper. Let marinate for at least 12 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. Peel the remaining onions and carrots; quarter the onions but leave the carrots whole.
7. Heat oil in a large heavy skillet, fry diced bacon and quartered onions until golden brown, and spoon into a casserole.
8. Remove meat from marinade and drain well. Brown meat in the remaining oil, then add to onions.
9. Pour marinade liquid and vegetables into the skillet, stirring to absorb the oil.
10. Add whole carrots, brandy, and herbs. Squeeze zest and juice from orange; add to sauce with salt and pepper.
11. Cook casserole in a slow oven (350°F) for 2 1/4 hours.
12. Serve garnished with parsley over spaghetti, macaroni, or noodles, topped with butter, grated cheese, and additional parsley.
